name: Skeledirge
flavor: Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

ability.name: Passionate Voice
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard 1 [Fire] Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. During this turn, attacks used by your [Fire] Pokémon do +50 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
